title: Ginger Garlic Paneer Stir-Fry
description: A savory and dense turkish dish featuring ginger garlic paste, whisked to create a flavorful base for paneer (cottage cheese). Sugar-free-friendly, perfect for brunch or light meals.

ingredients.name: Paneer
ingredients.notes: Choose a fresh, soft paneer for best results.

ingredients.name: Onion
ingredients.notes: Chopped finely to enhance the flavor of the dish.

ingredients.name: Fresh Coriander
ingredients.notes: Chopped to add a pop of color and freshness.

instructions: Heat the vegetable oil in a pan over medium heat.
Add the chopped onion, sauté for about 2 minutes until translucent.
Mix in the ginger garlic paste and cook for another minute, stirring occasionally.
Fold in the turmeric powder and salt. Cook for another 30 seconds to allow flavors to meld together.
Gently fold in the paneer cubes, ensuring they don’t break apart too much.
Cook for about 5-7 minutes until the paneer is heated through and slightly golden around the edges.
Remove from heat and garnish with fresh coriander just before serving.
